description_long: This is a red Coca-Cola can with a classic cylindrical aluminum body, featuring the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on the front. The can is decorated with dynamic white and yellow swooshes and water droplet graphics, giving it a cold, refreshing appearance. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism. On the back, there is a detailed nutritional information panel, barcode, and additional branding text in white. The can's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing its metallic construction. The overall design is vibrant and instantly recognizable as a popular carbonated soft drink container.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, water droplet graphics, and a silver pull-tab top. The back features nutritional information and a barcode.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo, water droplets, and dynamic swooshes on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the swoosh graphics and water droplets, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutritional information panel, barcode, and smaller Coca-Cola branding.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the logo and the nutritional label, with visible can curvature.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white script on the front and back of the can, with a curved, flowing shape and dominant red and white colors.
attribute_flavor_indication: The red color and Coca-Cola branding indicate the classic cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutritional information panel is visible on the back, including ingredients, nutritional values, and a barcode.
